chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D-325 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For hearing of M.A. No.1408/2026 For hearing of main case 17.03.2026 Mr. Naseem Khan Jamali, Advocate along with Petitioners M/s Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh and Nazar Muhammad Memon, Addl.P.G Sindh along with I.O/Inspector Shahadat Ali Khichi PS Quaidabad District Malir Karachi, and Inspector Muhammad Changal on behalf of SSP Hyderabad ----------- Both the Petitioners are present in Court along with their Counsel. Petitioner No.1 Mst Areeba has stated that she has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 out of her own volition, free from coercion or pressure but against wishes of her parents/relatives hence being annoyed her father Guddu Bihari (Respondent No.8) has lodged subject F.I.R. on false allegation that she has been abducted by the petitioner No.2, who is her husband. Pursuant to Order dated 19.02.2026, I.O/Inspector Shahadat Ali Khichi PS Quaidabad District Malir Karachi has effected appearance. He has recorded statement of Petitioner No.1 Mst Areeba wherein she has reiterated the above facts. The I.O. submits that in the light of such statement he will submit a report before the learned Magistrate concerned within seven days for appropriate orders. Petitioners and their counsel are satisfied and seek disposal of the petition in the said terms. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. However, if the report is submitted by the I.O. before the learned Magistrate concerned, he shall pass appropriate orders on said report in the light of recommendation of the I.O. in accordance with law.

Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. However, if the report is submitted by the I.O. before the learned Magistrate concerned, he shall pass appropriate orders on said report in the light of recommendation of the I.O. in accordance with law. The I.O. present today is directed to provide protection to the petitioners according to law. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
